# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System
 * XML Configuration File Parser using SimpleXML
 */

class XmlConfigProcessor
{
    private ?SimpleXMLElement $xml = null;
    private array $settings = [];
    private array $errors = [];
    private int $maxFileSizeBytes = 5242880; // 5MB
    private array $allowedRootElements = ['configuration', 'config', 'settings', 'appSettings'];

    /**
     * Load and parse XML configuration from a string
     *
     * @param string $xmlString Raw XML content
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded
     */
    public function loadFromString(string $xmlString): bool
    {
        $this->errors = [];
        $this->settings = [];

        if (empty(trim($xmlString))) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML string is empty.';
            return false;
        }

        if (strlen($xmlString) > $this->maxFileSizeBytes) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML content exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . ($this->maxFileSizeBytes / 1048576) . 'MB.';
            return false;
        }

        // Sanitize: remove potential XXE attack vectors
        $xmlString = $this->sanitizeXml($xmlString);

        // Disable external entity loading to prevent XXE attacks
        $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
        $previousLibxmlUseErrors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        try {
            $this->xml = simplexml_load_string(
                $xmlString,
                'SimpleXMLElement',
                LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOCDATA | LIBXML_NOENT
            );

            if ($this->xml === false) {
                $libxmlErrors = libxml_get_errors();
                foreach ($libxmlErrors as $error) {
                    $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                        'XML Parse Error [Line %d, Col %d]: %s',
                        $error->line,
                        $error->column,
                        trim($error->message)
                    );
                }
                libxml_clear_errors();
                return false;
            }

            // Validate root element
            $rootName = $this->xml->getName();
            if (!in_array($rootName, $this->allowedRootElements, true)) {
                $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                    'Invalid root element "%s". Allowed: %s',
                    $rootName,
                    implode(', ', $this->allowedRootElements)
                );
                return false;
            }

            // Extract settings into a flat/nested array
            $this->settings = $this->extractSettings($this->xml);

            return true;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Exception during XML parsing: ' . $e->getMessage();
            return false;
        } finally {
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlEntityLoader);
            libxml_use_internal_errors($previousLibxmlUseErrors);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Load and parse XML configuration from an uploaded file
     *
     * @param array $uploadedFile The $_FILES entry for the uploaded file
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded
     */
    public function loadFromUpload(array $uploadedFile): bool
    {
        $this->errors = [];

        // Validate upload
        if (!isset($uploadedFile['error']) || !isset($uploadedFile['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Invalid file upload data.';
            return false;
        }

        if ($uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->errors[] = 'File upload error: ' . $this->getUploadErrorMessage($uploadedFile['error']);
            return false;
        }

        if (!is_uploaded_file($uploadedFile['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Security violation: file was not uploaded via HTTP POST.';
            return false;
        }

        // Validate file extension
        $extension = strtolower(pathinfo($uploadedFile['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if ($extension !== 'xml') {
            $this->errors[] = 'Invalid file extension. Only .xml files are accepted.';
            return false;
        }

        // Validate MIME type
        $finfo = new \finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = $finfo->file($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        $allowedMimes = ['text/xml', 'application/xml', 'text/plain'];
        if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimes, true)) {
            $this->errors[] = sprintf('Invalid MIME type "%s". Expected XML content.', $mimeType);
            return false;
        }

        // Validate file size
        if ($uploadedFile['size'] > $this->maxFileSizeBytes) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Uploaded file exceeds maximum allowed size.';
            return false;
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Failed to read uploaded file.';
            return false;
        }

        return $this->loadFromString($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Load and parse XML configuration from a file path (for trusted internal files)
     *
     * @param string $filePath Path to the XML file
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded
     */
    public function loadFromFile(string $filePath): bool
    {
        $this->errors = [];

        $realPath = realpath($filePath);
        if ($realPath === false || !file_exists($realPath)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Configuration file not found: ' . basename($filePath);
            return false;
        }

        if (!is_readable($realPath)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Configuration file is not readable.';
            return false;
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($realPath);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Failed to read configuration file.';
            return false;
        }

        return $this->loadFromString($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize XML string to prevent XXE and other injection attacks
     *
     * @param string $xmlString Raw XML
     * @return string Sanitized XML
     */
    private function sanitizeXml(string $xmlString): string
    {
        // Remove DOCTYPE declarations to prevent XXE
        $xmlString = preg_replace('/<!DOCTYPE[^>]*>/i', '', $xmlString);

        // Remove ENTITY declarations
        $xmlString = preg_replace('/<!ENTITY[^>]*>/i', '', $xmlString);

        // Remove SYSTEM and PUBLIC references
        $xmlString = preg_replace('/SYSTEM\s+"[^"]*"/i', '', $xmlString);
        $xmlString = preg_replace('/PUBLIC\s+"[^"]*"\s+"[^"]*"/i', '', $xmlString);

        return $xmlString;
    }

    /**
     * Recursively extract settings from SimpleXMLElement into an associative array
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element XML element to process
     * @param string $prefix Key prefix for nested elements
     * @return array Extracted settings
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $element, string $prefix = ''): array
    {
        $settings = [];

        // Extract attributes of the current element
        foreach ($element->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
            $key = $prefix ? $prefix . '._attributes.' . (string)$attrName : '_attributes.' . (string)$attrName;
            $settings[$key] = $this->castValue((string)$attrValue);
        }

        foreach ($element->children() as $childName => $child) {
            $childName = (string)$childName;
            $currentKey = $prefix ? $prefix . '.' . $childName : $childName;

            $childChildren = $child->children();
            $childAttributes = $child->attributes();

            // Check if there are multiple siblings with the same name (array-like)
            $siblings = $element->{$childName};
            $siblingCount = $siblings->count();

            if ($siblingCount > 1) {
                // Handle as indexed array
                if (!isset($settings[$currentKey])) {
                    $settings[$currentKey] = [];
                }

                // Only process if we haven't already
                if (empty($settings[$currentKey])) {
                    $index = 0;
                    foreach ($siblings as $sibling) {
                        $siblingChildren = $sibling->children();
                        if ($siblingChildren->count() > 0) {
                            $nestedSettings = $this->extractSettings($sibling, '');
                            $entry = [];
                            foreach ($nestedSettings as $nestedKey => $nestedVal) {
                                $entry[$nestedKey] = $nestedVal;
                            }
                            // Also add attributes
                            foreach ($sibling->attributes() as $aName => $aVal) {
                                $entry['_attributes'][(string)$aName] = $this->castValue((string)$aVal);
                            }
                            $settings[$currentKey][$index] = $entry;
                        } else {
                            $entry = [
                                'value' => $this->castValue(trim((string)$sibling))
                            ];
                            foreach ($sibling->attributes() as $aName => $aVal) {
                                $entry['_attributes'][(string)$aName] = $this->castValue((string)$aVal);
                            }
                            $settings[$currentKey][$index] = $entry;
                        }
                        $index++;
                    }
                }
            } elseif ($childChildren->count() > 0) {
                // Has nested children — recurse
                $nestedSettings = $this->extractSettings($child, $currentKey);
                $settings = array_merge($settings, $nestedSettings);
            } else {
                // Leaf node
                $value = trim((string)$child);

                // If the element has a "key" and "value" attribute pattern (common config pattern)
                $keyAttr = (string)$childAttributes['key'];
                $valAttr = (string)$childAttributes['value'];

                if (!empty($keyAttr) && $valAttr !== '') {
                    $settings[$currentKey . '.' . $keyAttr] = $this->castValue($valAttr);
                } elseif (!empty($keyAttr)) {
                    $settings[$currentKey . '.' . $keyAttr] = $this->castValue($value);
                } else {
                    $settings[$currentKey] = $this->castValue($value);
                }

                // Store non-key/value attributes
                foreach ($childAttributes as $aName => $aVal) {
                    $aName = (string)$aName;
                    if ($aName !== 'key' && $aName !== 'value') {
                        $settings[$currentKey . '._attributes.' . $aName] = $this->castValue((string)$aVal);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    /**
     * Cast string values to appropriate PHP types
     *
     * @param string $value String value to cast
     * @return mixed Typed value
     */
    private function castValue(string $value)
    {
        // Boolean values
        $lower = strtolower($value);
        if ($lower === 'true') return true;
        if ($lower === 'false') return false;
        if ($lower === 'null') return null;

        // Integer values
        if (preg_match('/^-?\d+$/', $value) && strlen($value) < 19) {
            return (int)$value;
        }

        // Float values
        if (preg_match('/^-?\d+\.\d+$/', $value)) {
            return (float)$value;
        }

        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific setting by dot-notation key
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key (e.g., "database.connection.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if key not found
     * @return mixed Setting value or default
     */
    public function get(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $this->settings)) {
            return $this->settings[$key];
        }

        // Search for partial key matches (for nested groups)
        $prefix = $key . '.';
        $subSettings = [];
        foreach ($this->settings as $settingKey => $settingValue) {
            if (strpos($settingKey, $prefix) === 0) {
                $subKey = substr($settingKey, strlen($prefix));
                $subSettings[$subKey] = $settingValue;
            }
        }

        return !empty($subSettings) ? $subSettings : $default;
    }

    /**
     * Check if a setting exists
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key
     * @return bool
     */
    public function has(string $key): bool
    {
        if (array_key_exists($key, $this->settings)) {
            return true;
        }

        $prefix = $key . '.';
        foreach ($this->settings as $settingKey => $settingValue) {
            if (strpos($settingKey, $prefix) === 0) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Get all extracted settings
     *
     * @return array All settings as an associative array
     */
    public function getAll(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get all settings as a nested associative array
     *
     * @return array Nested settings
     */
    public function getAllNested(): array
    {
        $nested = [];
        foreach ($this->settings as $key => $value) {
            $this->setNestedValue($nested, $key, $value);
        }
        return $nested;
    }

    /**
     * Set a value in a nested array using dot notation
     *
     * @param array $array Target array
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key
     * @param mixed $value Value to set
     */
    private function setNestedValue(array &$array, string $key, $value): void
    {
        $keys = explode('.', $key);
        $current = &$array;

        foreach ($keys as $i => $segment) {
            if ($i === count($keys) - 1) {
                $current[$segment] = $value;
            } else {
                if (!isset($current[$segment]) || !is_array($current[$segment])) {
                    $current[$segment] = [];
                }
                $current = &$current[$segment];
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get groups/sections at the top level of the configuration
     *
     * @return array List of top-level section names
     */
    public function getSections(): array
    {
        $sections = [];
        foreach ($this->settings as $key => $value) {
            $parts = explode('.', $key);
            if (!in_array($parts[0], $sections, true)) {
                $sections[] = $parts[0];
            }
        }
        return $sections;
    }

    /**
     * Validate the parsed configuration against a schema definition
     *
     * @param array $schema Required keys and their expected types
     * @return bool True if valid
     */
    public function validate(array $schema): bool
    {
        $valid = true;

        foreach ($schema as $key => $rules) {
            $required = $rules['required'] ?? false;
            $type = $rules['type'] ?? null;
            $allowedValues = $rules['allowed_values'] ?? null;
            $minLength = $rules['min_length'] ?? null;
            $maxLength = $rules['max_length'] ?? null;

            if ($required && !$this->has($key)) {
                $this->errors[] = sprintf('Required configuration key "%s" is missing.', $key);
                $valid = false;
                continue;
            }

            if ($this->has($key) && $type !== null) {
                $value = $this->get($key);
                if (!$this->validateType($value, $type)) {
                    $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                        'Configuration key "%s" has invalid type. Expected: %s, Got: %s',
                        $key,
                        $type,
                        gettype($value)
                    );
                    $valid = false;
                }
            }

            if ($this->has($key) && $allowedValues !== null) {
                $value = $this->get($key);
                if (!in_array($value, $allowedValues, true)) {
                    $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                        'Configuration key "%s" has invalid value "%s". Allowed: %s',
                        $key,
                        $value,
                        implode(', ', $allowedValues)
                    );
                    $valid = false;
                }
            }

            if ($this->has($key) && is_string($this->get($key))) {
                $value = $this->get($key);
                if ($minLength !== null && strlen($value) < $minLength) {
                    $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                        'Configuration key "%s" value is too short. Minimum length: %d',
                        $key,
                        $minLength
                    );
                    $valid = false;
                }
                if ($maxLength !== null && strlen($value) > $maxLength) {
                    $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                        'Configuration key "%s" value is too long. Maximum length: %d',
                        $key,
                        $maxLength
                    );
                    $valid = false;
                }
            }
        }

        return $valid;
    }

    /**
     * Validate a value against an expected type
     *
     * @param mixed $value Value to check
     * @param string $type Expected type
     * @return bool
     */
    private function validateType($value, string $type): bool
    {
        switch (strtolower($type)) {
            case 'string':
                return is_string($value);
            case 'integer':
            case 'int':
                return is_int($value);
            case 'float':
            case 'double':
                return is_float($value) || is_int($value);
            case 'boolean':
            case 'bool':
                return is_bool($value);
            case 'array':
                return is_array($value);
            case 'numeric':
                return is_numeric($value);
            default:
                return true;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Merge another configuration into this one (later values override earlier)
     *
     * @param XmlConfigProcessor $other Another config processor
     * @return self
     */
    public function merge(XmlConfigProcessor $other): self
    {
        $this->settings = array_merge($this->settings, $other->getAll());
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Export the current settings back to XML string
     *
     * @param string $rootElement Root element name
     * @return string XML string
     */
    public function exportToXml(string $rootElement = 'configuration'): string
    {
        $nested = $this->getAllNested();
        $xml = new SimpleXMLElement("<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?><{$rootElement}/>");
        $this->arrayToXml($nested, $xml);

        $dom = dom_import_simplexml($xml)->ownerDocument;
        $dom->formatOutput = true;
        return $dom->saveXML();
    }

    /**
     * Convert array to XML recursively
     *
     * @param array $data Data array
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $xml XML element to populate
     */
    private function arrayToXml(array $data, SimpleXMLElement &$xml): void
    {
        foreach ($data as $key => $value) {
            if ($key === '_attributes') {
                if (is_array($value)) {
                    foreach ($value as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                        $xml->addAttribute($attrName, (string)$attrValue);
                    }
                }
                continue;
            }

            if (is_array($value)) {
                // Check if it's a sequential array (list of items)
                if (array_keys($value) === range(0, count($value) - 1)) {
                    foreach ($value as $item) {
                        if (is_array($item)) {
                            $child = $xml->addChild($key);
                            $this->arrayToXml($item, $child);
                        } else {
                            $xml->addChild($key, htmlspecialchars((string)$item));
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    $child = $xml->addChild($key);
                    $this->arrayToXml($value, $child);
                }
            } else {
                $xml->addChild($key, htmlspecialchars($this->valueToString($value)));
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Convert a typed value back to string for XML output
     *
     * @param mixed $value Value to convert
     * @return string
     */
    private function valueToString($value): string
    {
        if (is_bool($value)) {
            return $value ? 'true' : 'false';
        }
        if (is_null($value)) {
            return 'null';
        }
        return (string)$value;
    }

    /**
     * Get parsing/validation errors
     *
     * @return array List of error messages
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Check if there are any errors
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasErrors(): bool
    {
        return !empty($this->errors);
    }

    /**
     * Set maximum allowed file/content size
     *
     * @param int $bytes Maximum size in bytes
     * @return self
     */
    public function setMaxFileSize(int $bytes): self
    {
        $this->maxFileSizeBytes = $bytes;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set allowed root element names
     *
     * @param array $elements List of allowed root element names
     * @return self
     */
    public function setAllowedRootElements(array $elements): self
    {
        $this->allowedRootElements = $elements;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get the raw SimpleXMLElement object
     *
     * @return SimpleXMLElement|null
     */
    public function getRawXml(): ?SimpleXMLElement
    {
        return $this->xml;
    }

    /**
     * Get human-readable upload error message
     *
     * @param int $errorCode PHP upload error code
     * @return string
     */
    private function getUploadErrorMessage(int $errorCode): string
    {
        $messages = [
            UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => 'File exceeds the upload_max_filesize directive.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => 'File exceeds the MAX_FILE_SIZE form directive.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => 'File was only partially uploaded.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => 'No file was uploaded.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => 'Missing temporary folder.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => 'Failed to write file to disk.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => 'A PHP extension stopped the file upload.',
        ];

        return $messages[$errorCode] ?? 'Unknown upload error.';
    }
}


// ============================================================
// USAGE EXAMPLES
// ============================================================

// Example 1: Parse XML from a string
$xmlConfig = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
    <appName>Enterprise CMS</appName>
    <version>3.5.1</version>
    <debug>false</debug>
    <maxConnections>100</maxConnections>
    
    <database>
        <connection>
            <host>db.enterprise.local</host>
            <port>3306</port>
            <name>enterprise_db</name>
            <username>app_user</username>
            <password>s3cur3P@ss!</password>
            <charset>utf8mb4</charset>
            <poolSize>25</poolSize>
        </connection>
        <replication>
            <enabled>true</enabled>
            <readReplica>
                <host>db-read-1.enterprise.local</host>
                <port>3306</port>
            </readReplica>
            <readReplica>
                <host>db-read-2.enterprise.local</host>
                <port>3306</port>
            </readReplica>
        </replication>
    </database>
    
    <cache>
        <driver>redis</driver>
        <host>cache.enterprise.local</host>
        <port>6379</port>
        <ttl>3600</ttl>
        <prefix>ent_</prefix>
    </cache>
    
    <logging>
        <level>warning</level>
        <output>file</output>
        <path>/var/log/enterprise/app.log</path>
        <maxSize>104857600</maxSize>
        <rotate>true</rotate>
    </logging>
    
    <security>
        <csrfProtection>true</csrfProtection>
        <sessionTimeout>1800</sessionTimeout>
        <passwordMinLength>12</passwordMinLength>
        <mfaEnabled>true</mfaEnabled>
        <allowedOrigin key="api">https://api.enterprise.com</allowedOrigin>
        <allowedOrigin key="web">https://www.enterprise.com</allowedOrigin>
    </security>
    
    <features>
        <feature key="notifications" value="true"/>
        <feature key="analytics" value="true"/>
        <feature key="beta_dashboard" value="false"/>
    </features>
</configuration>
XML;

$processor = new XmlConfigProcessor();

if ($processor->loadFromString($xmlConfig)) {
    echo "=== Configuration Loaded Successfully ===\n\n";

    // Get specific settings
    echo "App Name: " . $processor->get('appName') . "\n";
    echo "Version: " . $processor->get('version') . "\n";
    echo "Debug Mode: " . ($processor->get('debug') ? 'Enabled' : 'Disabled') . "\n";
    echo "Max Connections: " . $processor->get('maxConnections') . "\n\n";

    // Get nested settings
    echo "--- Database Settings ---\n";
    $dbSettings = $processor->get('database.connection');
    if (is_array($dbSettings)) {
        foreach ($dbSettings as $key => $value) {
            echo "  {$key}: {$value}\n";
        }
    }

    echo "\n--- Cache Settings ---\n";
    echo "Driver: " . $processor->get('cache.driver') . "\n";
    echo "Host: " . $processor->get('cache.host') . "\n";
    echo "TTL: " . $processor->get('cache.ttl') . " seconds\n";

    echo "\n--- Security Settings ---\n";
    echo "CSRF Protection: " . ($processor->get('security.csrfProtection') ? 'Yes' : 'No') . "\n";
    echo "Session Timeout: " . $processor->get('security.sessionTimeout') . " seconds\n";
    echo "MFA Enabled: " . ($processor->get('security.mfaEnabled') ? 'Yes' : 'No') . "\n";

    // Check sections
    echo "\n--- Configuration Sections ---\n";
    $sections = $processor->getSections();
    echo implode(', ', $sections) . "\n";

    // Check if setting exists
    echo "\n--- Setting Existence Check ---\n";
    echo "Has 'database': " . ($processor->has('database') ? 'Yes' : 'No') . "\n";
    echo "Has 'smtp': " . ($processor->has('smtp') ? 'Yes' : 'No') . "\n";

    // Validate against a schema
    echo "\n--- Schema Validation ---\n";
    $schema = [
        'appName' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string', 'min_length' => 1],
        'version' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string'],
        'database.connection.host' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string'],
        'database.connection.port' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'int'],
        'cache.driver' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string', 'allowed_values' => ['redis', 'memcached', 'file']],
        'logging.level' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string', 'allowed_values' => ['debug', 'info', 'warning', 'error', 'critical']],
    ];

    if ($processor->validate($schema)) {
        echo "Configuration is valid!\n";
    } else {
        echo "Validation errors:\n";
        foreach ($processor->getErrors() as $error) {
            echo "  - {$error}\n";
        }
    }

    // Export back to XML
    echo "\n--- Exported XML (first 500 chars) ---\n";
    $exported = $processor->exportToXml();
    echo substr($exported, 0, 500) . "...\n";

    // Get all settings flattened
    echo "\n--- All Settings (Flat) ---\n";
    $allSettings = $processor->getAll();
    foreach ($allSettings as $key => $value) {
        if (is_array($value)) {
            echo "  {$key}: [array with " . count($value) . " items]\n";
        } else {
            echo "  {$key}: " . var_export($value, true) . "\n";
        }
    }
} else {
    echo "Failed to load configuration:\n";
    foreach ($processor->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  - {$error}\n";
    }
}


// Example 2: Handle file upload (in a web context)
/*
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['config_file'])) {
    $processor = new XmlConfigProcessor();
    $processor->setMaxFileSize(2 * 1024 * 1024); // 2MB limit

    if ($processor->loadFromUpload($_FILES['config_file'])) {
        // Validate against required schema
        $schema = [
            'appName' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string'],
            'database.connection.host' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string'],
        ];

        if ($processor->validate($schema)) {
            echo json_encode([
                'success' => true,
                'settings' => $processor->getAllNested(),
                'sections' => $processor->getSections(),
            ]);
        } else {
            http_response_code(422);
            echo json_encode([
                'success' => false,
                'errors' => $processor->getErrors(),
            ]);
        }
    } else {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'errors' => $processor->getErrors(),
        ]);
    }
}
*/

// Example 3: Merge multiple configuration files
/*
$baseConfig = new XmlConfigProcessor();
$baseConfig->loadFromFile('/etc/enterprise/base-config.xml');

$envConfig = new XmlConfigProcessor();
$envConfig->loadFromFile('/etc/enterprise/production-config.xml');

// Environment config overrides base config
$baseConfig->merge($envConfig);

$dbHost = $baseConfig->get('database.connection.host');
*/
